pipeline_summary: 2D pose (MediaPipe-style landmarks), HQ visibility/motion gate, body-part diagnostics; parent job used optional temporal smoothing on accepted frames.

documentation.per_frame_scores: See Motion Dataset Engine: weighted visibility + lower-body + motion_local (action-aware nudge).
documentation.sequence_scores: See features.json sequence block; motion_consistency blends smoothed step-length CV with a MAD/median robust term.
